_translation_status.review: Engineering mirror of fr.json. Translations should be reviewed by a bilingual project liaison before public launch.

header.title: RÉCOR
header.tagline: Registry of Effective Control and Real Origin · National Beneficial Ownership Registry of Cameroon

intro.heading: File a beneficial ownership declaration
intro.body: Every legal entity operating in Cameroon must disclose the natural person who ultimately controls it. Your submission is signed cryptographically by your browser; the signing key is generated here and never leaves your device.

footer.encryption: Submissions are encrypted in transit. The cryptographic receipt allows you to verify what you submitted years later.

owners.instructions: List every natural person who ultimately controls the entity. Ownership must total exactly 100% (10 000 basis points).

validation.ownersMin: at least one beneficial owner required
validation.ownersMax: more than 64 owners is unusual; contact support
validation.ownersTotal: beneficial owners must collectively hold 100% (10 000 basis points)
validation.ownersUnique: each beneficial owner person_id must appear only once
validation.effectiveFromFuture: effective_from cannot be in the future

crypto.browserUnsupportedHeading: Your browser does not support Ed25519 signing
crypto.browserUnsupportedBody: RÉCOR requires browser-side cryptographic signing of beneficial-ownership declarations. Please use a recent version of Chrome (113+), Firefox (130+), or Safari (17.4+).

descriptions.accepted: The verification engine accepted your declaration. It is now the authoritative record for this entity until a future submission supersedes it.
descriptions.rejected: The verification engine rejected your declaration. Review the case details with your declarant-experience team; you may resubmit with corrections or seek an analyst review.
descriptions.in_verification: Your declaration is queued for human analyst review. The engine could not auto-accept it from the available evidence. You will be notified once the analyst makes a decision.
descriptions.pending: Your declaration has been received and is waiting for the verification engine to process it.

verification.receiptKeepNotice: Keep your declaration ID and receipt hash. The receipt hash is a cryptographic commitment to the content you submitted — RÉCOR cannot alter what you declared without invalidating this hash.

1.title: Entity
1.heading: Identify the entity
1.description: Provide the entity identifier, your declarant role, and the effective date of this declaration.

2.title: Owners
2.heading: Beneficial owners
2.description: List every natural person who ultimately controls the entity; ownership must total exactly 100%.

3.title: Review
3.heading: Review your declaration
3.description: Re-read each field. The cryptographic preview below shows the exact bytes that will be signed in the next step.

4.title: Sign
4.heading: Sign and submit
4.description: Your browser signs the canonical bytes with your Ed25519 key, then submits the declaration to the RÉCOR service.

review.canonicalBytesExplanation: These are the exact canonical bytes your browser is about to sign. Any difference from what is transmitted invalidates the signature — please confirm before continuing.

sign.publicKeyExplanation: This public key travels with your declaration and lets RÉCOR verify the signature. The matching private key never leaves your browser's memory.

drafts.savedAt: Last saved {{when}}. Drafts are stored only on this device and expire after 24 hours.
drafts.unavailableNotice: Offline drafts are unavailable in this browser (IndexedDB is disabled). Your form is not being saved — submit before leaving this page.
